name: search_web
description: Search the web via a tiered provider chain. Default: DuckDuckGo (keyless). Upgrades automatically if TAVILY_API_KEY, EXA_API_KEY, BRAVE_API_KEY, PERPLEXITY_API_KEY, FIRECRAWL_API_KEY, or JINA_API_KEY is set. Pass `provider` to override.

answer.description: Optional — present when the provider returns a synthesized answer (Tavily, Perplexity)

usageHints: Primary tool for finding sources on any web topic
Returns which provider served the result so you can weight result quality
Use provider='exa' for semantic 'find pages like X' search, 'perplexity' when you want an answer + citations
